'''gathate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quadrilingually|quadrilingually]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-th-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quadrilingually|quadrilingually]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| gathate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:gathate|gathate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:gathatesher|gathatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gathatesherĂ«m|gathatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gathatero|gathatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gathateshĂ«|gathateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gathateshĂ«m|gathateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigathatero|gokigathatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokigathateshĂ«|gokigathateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigathateshĂ«m|gokigathateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gogathankerom|gogathankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogathankeshĂ«|gogathankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogathankeshĂ«m|gogathankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gogathankeya|gogathankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gathaterom|gathaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gathatemu|gathatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gathateya|gathateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigathaterom|gokigathaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigathatemu|gokigathatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokigathateya|gokigathateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:gathathate|gathathate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:gathathatesher|gathathatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gathathatesherĂ«m|gathathatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gathathatero|gathathatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gathathateshĂ«|gathathateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gathathateshĂ«m|gathathateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigathathatero|gokigathathatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokigathathateshĂ«|gokigathathateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigathathateshĂ«m|gokigathathateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gogathathankerom|gogathathankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogathathankeshĂ«|gogathathankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogathathankeshĂ«m|gogathathankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gogathathankeya|gogathathankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gathathaterom|gathathaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gathathatemu|gathathatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gathathateya|gathathateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigathathaterom|gokigathathaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigathathatemu|gokigathathatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokigathathateya|gokigathathateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:gĂŠthĂŠte|gĂŠthĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:gĂŠthĂŠtesher|gĂŠthĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gĂŠthĂŠtesherĂ«m|gĂŠthĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gĂŠthĂŠtero|gĂŠthĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«|gĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«m|gĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigĂŠthĂŠtero|gokigĂŠthĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokigĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«|gokigĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«m|gokigĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gogĂŠthĂŠnkerom|gogĂŠthĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogĂŠthĂŠnkeshĂ«|gogĂŠthĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogĂŠthĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gogĂŠthĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gogĂŠthĂŠnkeya|gogĂŠthĂŠnkeya]]
|-

|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gĂŠthĂŠtemu|gĂŠthĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gĂŠthĂŠteya|gĂŠthĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigĂŠthĂŠterom|gokigĂŠthĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigĂŠthĂŠtemu|gokigĂŠthĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokigĂŠthĂŠteya|gokigĂŠthĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:gafthafte|gafthafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:gafthaftesher|gafthaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gafthaftesherĂ«m|gafthaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gafthaftero|gafthaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gafthafteshĂ«|gafthafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gafthafteshĂ«m|gafthafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigafthaftero|gokigafthaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokigafthafteshĂ«|gokigafthafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigafthafteshĂ«m|gokigafthafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gogafthafnkerom|gogafthafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogafthafnkeshĂ«|gogafthafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogafthafnkeshĂ«m|gogafthafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gogafthafnkeya|gogafthafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gafthafterom|gafthafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gafthaftemu|gafthaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gafthafteya|gafthafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigafthafterom|gokigafthafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigafthaftemu|gokigafthaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokigafthafteya|gokigafthafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
